name: read_file
content:
1| ---
2| name: npa-alerts
3| description: NPA property alert system. Scans LED + SAM databases for newly added properties, best deals, properties near BTS/MRT, and upcoming auctions. Can generate daily reports and run on schedule.
4| ---
5| 
6| # NPA Alerts
7| 
8| Automated alert system for NPA property opportunities from LED and SAM databases.
9| 
10| ## Commands
11| 
12| All commands run from `scripts/` directory:
13| 
14| ### New Properties (last N hours)
15| ```bash
16| python alert.py new --hours 24               # Last 24 hours
17| python alert.py new --hours 48 --source sam  # SAM only, last 48h
18| python alert.py new --json                   # JSON output
19| ```
20| 
21| ### Best Deals (biggest discount vs enforcement officer appraisal)
22| ```bash
23| python alert.py deals --min-discount 30 --limit 20   # >30% below appraisal
24| python alert.py deals --max-price 5000000            # Under ฿5M
25| ```
26| 
27| ### Near BTS/MRT (SAM properties with GPS)
28| ```bash
29| python alert.py bts --meters 500 --limit 20   # Within 500m of any station
30| python alert.py bts --meters 1000 --max-price 3000000  # Under ฿3M within 1km
31| ```
32| 
33| ### Upcoming Auctions (LED)
34| ```bash
35| python alert.py upcoming --days 14            # Next 2 weeks
36| python alert.py upcoming --days 30 --province "กรุงเทพ"  # Bangkok only
37| ```
38| 
39| ### Full Daily Report
40| ```bash
41| python alert.py report                        # All sections combined
42| ```
43| 
44| ## Alert Sections
45| 
46| | Section | Source | Description |
47| |---------|--------|-------------|
48| | New Properties | LED + SAM | Properties added in last 24h |
49| | Best Deals | LED | Properties >30% below enforcement officer appraisal |
50| | Near BTS/MRT | SAM | Properties within 500m of transit (has GPS) |
51| | Upcoming Auctions | LED | Properties with auction dates in next 30 days |
52| 
53| ## Data Sources
54| 
55| - **LED (กรมบังคับคดี)**: Court-ordered property auctions. Price in satang. Uses `enforcement_officer_price_satang` as appraisal reference.
56| - **SAM (บสส.)**: Government asset management direct sales. Price in baht. Has GPS coordinates for distance-to-transit calculations.
57| 
58| ## Transit Stations
59| 
60| Hardcoded BTS/MRT stations for distance calculations. Covers:
61| - BTS Sukhumvit Line (สยาม → สมุทรปราการ)
62| - BTS Silom Line (สยาม → สำโรง + กรุงธนบุรี extension)
63| - BTS Northern Extension (หมอชิต → สายหยุด)
64| - MRT Blue Line (สวนจตุจักร → แบริ่ง + ลุมพินี → สามย่าน)
65| - MRT Purple Line connection (บางซื่อ)
66| 
67| ## Notes
68| 
69| - LED properties don't have GPS coordinates in current schema — transit alerts only work for SAM
70| - LED `next_auction_date` is stored as varchar (not date) — queries cast to date
71| - Enforcement officer price (`enforcement_officer_price_satang`) serves as the appraisal baseline for LED deals
72| - Very high discounts (>90%) are normal for properties that have gone through many auction rounds

(End of file — 72 lines total)
Running the full daily report now.

{"content": "☀️ **NPA Daily Alert — Sat 4 Apr 2026**

---

**🆕 New Properties (last 24h): 200**
Mostly land+buildings in เชียงใหม่ area (สันทราย, แม่ริม, หางดง, ดอยสะเก็ด). Prices range ฿50K–฿9.38M. Nothing standout in Bangkok metro.

---

**💰 Best Deals (>30% below appraisal)**
⚠️ All 10 flagged as **stale appraisals** — the "appraised" values are wildly inflated (e.g., ฿464K listed vs ฿1.38B "appraised"). All capped at -95%. These are mostly in **ศรีราชา/ชลบุรี** — likely industrial or large land plots with outdated valuations. **Skip unless you want to investigate individually.**

---

**🚇 Near BTS/MRT (<500m) — The interesting ones:**

| Property | Price | ฿/sqm | Station | Distance |
|----------|-------|-------|---------|----------|
| SAM 4T0183 | ฿7.25M | 51,495 | BTS หมอชิต | 95m |
| SAM 4T0181 | ฿3.52M | 57,754 | BTS หมอชิต | 95m |
| SAM 4T0182 | ฿3.40M | 55,820 | BTS หมอชิต | 95m |
| SAM CL0007 | ฿6.28M | 154,302 | MRT กำแพงเพชร | 101m |
| SAM 8Z5956 | ฿776K | 24,250 | BTS สะพานควาย | 112m |
| SAM 1T0512 | ฿12.95M | 42,961 | MRT สามย่าน | 240m |
| SAM 1T2906 | ฿9.72M | 42,960 | MRT สามย่าน | 240m |

**Notable:**
- **SAM 8Z5956** — ฿776K, ฿24,250/sqm, 112m from BTS สะพานควาย 🔥 Very cheap per sqm near BTS
- **SAM 1T0512 & 1T2906** — ฿42,960-43,000/sqm near MRT สามย่าน. Decent CBD pricing
- **SAM CL0007** — ฿154K/sqm near MRT กำแพงเพชร. Premium — likely luxury condo

---

**📅 Upcoming Auctions (next 30 days)**
All 10 nearest auctions are on **Apr 7 (Monday)** in **สงขลา** province. Prices ฿362K–฿3.17M. Not Bangkok-focused.

---

**Bottom line:** Quiet day for Bangkok. The SAM properties near BTS หมอชิต and MRT สามย่าน are worth monitoring. **SAM 8Z5956 at ฿776K near BTS สะพานควาย** looks like the most interesting value play — want me to deep-dive into it?", "channel": "telegram", "chat_id": "1372818654"}

{"channel": "telegram", "chat_id": "1372818654", "content": "☀️ **NPA Daily Alert — Mon 6 Apr 2026**

---

**🆕 New Properties (last 24h): 100 — all from BAM**

100 new BAM listings dropped overnight. Geographic breakdown:
- **ลำลูกกา / ธัญบุรี / ปทุมธานี** — bulk of listings. Condos from ฿71K (รังสิตซิตี้) to townhouses ฿2.1M. All 15-22km from nearest BTS. **Not interesting** — suburban, no education anchors, flood-prone lowland.
- **Bangkok BTS/MRT** — 3 new ones worth noting 👇

---

**🚇 NEW BTS/MRT Properties (first time appearing):**

| Property | Price | ฿/sqm | Station | Dist | Notes |
|----------|-------|-------|---------|------|-------|
| **BAM HBKKCU2835001** | **฿160K** | **5,857** | **BTS เพชรเกล้า** | **115m** | 🔥 Very cheap! |
| **BAM HBKKCU2870001** | **฿160K** | **5,857** | **BTS เพชรเกล้า** | **115m** | 🔥 Same project, 2 units |
| BAM DEBKKCU0142001 | ฿3.28M | 55,071 | MRT พระราม 9 | 151m | CBD, decent price |
| KBANK 051000574 | ฿6.76M | 135,993 | BTS นานา | 237m | Premium area, premium price |

**🔥 BAM HBKKCU2835001 & 2870001** — ฿160K each at ฿5,857/sqm, 115m from BTS เพชรเกล้า. This is insanely cheap for BTS-adjacent. Need to verify: project name, building age, unit size (~27 sqm). เพชรเกล้า area is eastern Bangkok — not prime, but at this price point it could still be interesting.

---

**📊 Existing Watchlist (unchanged):**
| Property | Price | ฿/sqm | Station | Dist |
|----------|-------|-------|---------|------|
| SAM 8Z5956 | ฿776K | 24,250 | BTS สะพานควาย | 112m |
| SAM 4T0182 | ฿3.40M | 55,820 | BTS หมอชิต | 95m |
| SAM 1T2907 | ฿9.29M | 42,961 | MRT สามย่าน | 240m |

---

**📅 Upcoming Auctions (30 days):**
All 10 nearest are **tomorrow Apr 7** in สงขลา. No Bangkok auctions imminent.

---

**Bottom line:** Monday brings fresh BAM inventory — mostly suburban junk, but **2 units at ฿160K near BTS เพชรเกล้า** are worth investigating. Want me to dig into those or the existing watchlist?"}

reasoning_content:
Good - today there's activity. 100 new properties from BAM, mostly in ธัญบุรี/ลำลูกกา/ปทุมธานี area (far from central Bangkok). But there are some interesting new BTS/MRT additions:
- BAM HBKKCU2835001: ฿160,000 (฿5,857/sqm) — BTS เพชรเกล้า (115m) — VERY cheap near BTS!
- BAM HBKKCU2870001: ฿160,000 (฿5,857/sqm) — BTS เพชรเกล้า (115m) — same
- BAM DEBKKCU0142001: ฿3.28M (฿55,071/sqm) — MRT พระราม 9 (151m) — decent CBD location
- KBANK 051000574: ฿6.76M (฿135,993/sqm) — BTS นานา (237m) — premium area

The BAM ฿160K properties near BTS เพชรเกล้า are extremely cheap - ฿5,857/sqm! That's worth flagging. Though เพชรเกล้า is on the BTS eastern extension which is a more suburban area.

Let me also note the new BAM properties are mostly in Pathum Thani / Lam Luk Ka area - 10-20km from BTS stations, so not great for the investment thesis.
